verdicts.verdict_greek: καὶ οὕτως διωρθώθησαν αἱ τρίβοι τῶν ἐπὶ γῆς, καὶ τὰ ἀρεστά σου ἐδιδάχθησαν ἄνθρωποι,
verdicts.reasoning: On the scan (p. 620) verse 18 ends after ἄνθρωποι with a comma, while the next line is separately numbered (19); τρίβοι is clearly printed, not First1K’s τρὰβοι, and Cambridge/Tischendorf likewise support τρίβοι here.
The scan prints this as the separately numbered verse (19) at the foot of p. 620, matching First1K exactly; this division also agrees with Swete’s layout though Rahlfs combines it with v. 18.

notes: Adjudicated from the Wisdom 9 text on Swete p. 620; verse division in Swete separates v. 19 from v. 18.
